value: A successful match means the patient and therapist work together long enough for the patient to report feeling better about their presenting issue and view the therapeutic relationship and time together as ultimately beneficial in their life.
Patient + therapist + time =  a relationship that helps. Everything we build serves that formula.
Tell us what matters most and we'll do all the legwork to match you with pre-qualified therapists who actually want to work with you.
No more searching, cold-outreach or getting ghosted
Our matching engine filters, scores and then anonymously contacts the best suited therapists in the state. They opt in or out based on fitting your needs.
Two minutes, anonymous. No login. Pick what matters most: issues, schedule, payment, experience. Or, go deeper. Your choice.
